description: This Java class 'RiskDecisioningService' implements a risk scoring and decision engine for loan applications, utilizing applicant data and optional credit bureau reports to produce a risk score and decision.

classes.name: RiskDecisioningService
classes.description: Service class for calculating risk scores and decisions for loan applications based on applicant data and credit bureau reports.

classes.name: RiskDecision
classes.description: Record representing the risk score, decision, and reason for a loan application.

classes.name: Decision
classes.description: Enum defining possible decision outcomes: PRE_QUALIFIED, MANUAL_REVIEW, DECLINED.

methods.name: scoreAndDecide
methods.description: Main method to compute risk score and decision from JSON input.

methods.name: buildReason
methods.description: Constructs a detailed reason string explaining the decision.

methods.name: extractCreditBureauRequest
methods.description: Extracts credit bureau request info from JSON data.

methods.name: firstText
methods.description: Utility to get first non-empty text value from multiple JSON nodes.

methods.name: readJsonOrEmptyObject
methods.description: Parses JSON string into JsonNode, returns empty object on failure.

methods.name: firstDecimal
methods.description: Utility to get first valid BigDecimal from multiple JSON nodes.

methods.name: firstInteger
methods.description: Utility to get first valid Integer from multiple JSON nodes.

methods.name: firstBoolean
methods.description: Utility to get first valid Boolean from multiple JSON nodes.
